title: Elves Lane A implementer done report
description: Batch-close report written by the Grok implementer (or host on its behalf) under .elves/runtime/implement/done/batch-N.json. Schema version 1 for the smart-plan → Grok implement dogfood.

status.description: Outcome of the implementer turn for this batch.

session_id.description: Exact Grok session id used for the batch, if known.

head.description: git rev-parse HEAD after the implementer's last commit for this batch.

commits.description: Ordered list of commit lines (prefer 'sha subject').

tests.description: Counts from the implementer's local validation run.

blockers.description: Empty when status is complete; otherwise human-readable blockers.

acceptance.description: Per-criterion acceptance rows with proof, not self-certification alone.

notes.description: Optional free-form notes for the host gate.
